Four Small Browser Tools I Am Reinforcing for Search in 2026
#
tools

I am keeping a public maintenance trail for a small group of free browser tools built with AI.

This round is focused on four weaker sites that need more crawl signals and public references.

1. FreeTDEE

FreeTDEE is a browser-based calorie, BMR, TDEE, and macro calculator.

Four Free Browser Tools I Am Reinforcing for Search

I am running a small AI programming outbound experiment around free browser tools.

The lesson this week is simple: shipping the site is not the finish line. Search only starts to care when the site stays healthy, gets submitted, receives public references, and keeps proving that it is maintained.

This round focuses on four weaker tools.

FreeTDEE
https://freetdee.com/

A free TDEE, BMR, calorie, and macro calculat
